name: pi-ironin-smart-compaction
description: Smart session compaction with LLM scoring. Uses gemini-2.5-flash-lite to score turns 0-10, keeping HIGH verbatim, summarizing MEDIUM, dropping LOW. Configurable provider/model via settings.json.
author: CK @ iRonin.IT

scripts.test: npx tsx test/test-heuristic.ts && npx tsx test/test-high-tokens.ts && npx tsx test/test-fallback-chain.ts
